Manage Consent

By clicking "Accept Cookies", you agree to the storing of cookies and similar technologies on your device to provide online services, enhance the performance and functionality of our services, analyze the use of our website, and assist with our advertising and marketing efforts, in accordance with the Miva Open University privacy policy.

Functional Always active
The technical storage or access is strictly necessary for the legitimate purpose of enabling the use of a specific service explicitly requested by the subscriber or user, or for the sole purpose of carrying out the transmission of a communication over an electronic communications network.
Preferences
The technical storage or access is necessary for the legitimate purpose of storing preferences that are not requested by the subscriber or user.
Statistics
The technical storage or access that is used exclusively for statistical purposes. The technical storage or access that is used exclusively for anonymous statistical purposes. Without a subpoena, voluntary compliance on the part of your Internet Service Provider, or additional records from a third party, information stored or retrieved for this purpose alone cannot usually be used to identify you.
Marketing
The technical storage or access is required to create user profiles to send advertising, or to track the user on a website or across several websites for similar marketing purposes.
Manage options Manage services Manage {vendor_count} vendors Read more about these purposes
View preferences
Cookie Policy {title} {title}
Manage Consent
To provide the best experiences, we use technologies like cookies to store and/or access device information. Consenting to these technologies will allow us to process data such as browsing behavior or unique IDs on this site. Not consenting or withdrawing consent, may adversely affect certain features and functions.

The technical storage or access is strictly necessary for the legitimate purpose of enabling the use of a specific service explicitly requested by the subscriber or user, or for the sole purpose of carrying out the transmission of a communication over an electronic communications network.
Preferences
The technical storage or access is necessary for the legitimate purpose of storing preferences that are not requested by the subscriber or user.
Statistics
The technical storage or access that is used exclusively for statistical purposes. The technical storage or access that is used exclusively for anonymous statistical purposes. Without a subpoena, voluntary compliance on the part of your Internet Service Provider, or additional records from a third party, information stored or retrieved for this purpose alone cannot usually be used to identify you.
Marketing
The technical storage or access is required to create user profiles to send advertising, or to track the user on a website or across several websites for similar marketing purposes.

Miva Open University is licensed by the National Universities Commission

Matriculation Highlights

Highlights from Miva’s
2025 Matriculation

The 2025 Miva Open University Matriculation Ceremony welcomed over 8,000 new students. Babatunde Raji Fashola, SAN, CON, former Lagos State Governor, delivered the keynote, urging students to embrace discipline, service, and leadership and to use their education as a tool for national development and public impact.

Learn More

Why Miva?

At Miva Open University, we believe education should be accessible, flexible, and shaped by real career needs. Our blended learning model allows you to study at your own pace without stepping away from work or life. With licensed programmes, affordable tuition, and a curriculum informed by industry practice, Miva equips you with the skills, confidence, and qualifications needed to progress in a changing world.

Licensed

Licensed by NUC, your degree is fully recognised.

Affordable

Quality digital education with transparent and flexible fees.

Flexible

Learn anytime, anywhere, and graduate right on time.

Career Focused

Industry-aligned programmes that build employable skills.

Programmes

Innovative Programmes
Designed for the Future

School of Computing

BSc. Artificial Intelligence

This programme prepares the next generation of AI professionals to design, develop, and deploy intelligent solutions to real-world challenges across sectors like healthcare, agriculture, finance, education, and governance.

Tuition per session

$635

Learn More

School of Computing

BSc. Software Engineering

This discipline deals with the development, design, and maintenance of software systems. It involves applying engineering principles and practices to create high-quality software products.

Tuition per session

$560

Learn More

School of Computing

BSc. Computer Science

This programme is designed to prepare you for a career in the ever-growing field of technology. 

Tuition per session

$560

Learn More

School of Computing

BSc. Cybersecurity

This programme is designed to prepare individuals for careers in the field of cybersecurity, which focuses on protecting computer systems, networks, and data from unauthorised access, attacks, and threats.

Tuition per session

$560

Learn More

School of Computing

BSc. Data Science

This programme prepares you for careers across technology, finance, health, and more, equipping you with the data science skills to extract insights, drive decisions, and create impact across industries.

Tuition per session

$560

Learn More

School of Computing

BSc. Information Technology

Our B.Sc. Information Technology programme equips you with the skills to excel in today’s information-driven world.

Tuition per session

$560

Learn More

School of Management and Social Sciences

BSc. Economics

This programme equips you with the skills to excel across finance, consulting, government, or academia.

Tuition per session

$560

Learn More

School of Management and Social Sciences

BSc. Accounting

This programme prepares you for a career in accounting, covering financial, managerial, tax, auditing, and information systems, with options to specialise in key areas.

Tuition per session

$560

Learn More

School of Management and Social Sciences

BSc. Public Policy and Administration

The degree provides accessible and high-quality education to equip our students with a versatile skill set and help them succeed in public service and policy-making roles, contributing to shaping policies and improving society.

Tuition per session

$560

Learn More

School of Management and Social Sciences

BSc. Entrepreneurship

This programme is designed to equip individuals with the knowledge and skills needed to embark on entrepreneurial ventures, focusing on the creation, management, and growth of successful businesses and startups.

Tuition per session

$560

Learn More

School of Management and Social Sciences

BSc. Criminology and Security Studies

Our B.Sc. Criminology and Security Studies programme equips you to analyse and address modern security and criminal justice challenges.

Tuition per session

$560

Learn More

School of Management and Social Sciences

BSc. Business Management

This degree caters to both recent high school graduates and individuals with prior business experience. 

Tuition per session

$560

Learn More

School of Communication and Media Studies

BSc. Mass Communication and Media Studies

This degree is designed for individuals passionate about information dissemination and want to make a career out of it. It is suitable for both secondary school graduates and those with prior experience in the field.

Tuition per session

$560

Learn More

School of Allied Health Sciences

B.EHS Environmental Health Science

The programme is designed to equip you with the knowledge to address environmental health risks, ensure safety, and promote public health through sustainable practices.

Tuition per session

$635

Learn More

School of Allied Health Sciences

B.CHS Community of Health Science

This programme empowers you to build practical skills to promote community health, prevent disease, and support public health initiatives at the grassroots level.

Tuition per session

$635

Learn More

School of Allied Health Sciences

BSc. in Public Health

Public health is the science and practice of protecting and improving the health of populations. Explore the social, economic, environmental, and political factors that influence health, and gain a strong foundation in public health research, policy, and practice.

Tuition per session

$560

Learn More

School of Allied Health Sciences

B.NSc. Nursing Science

This programme is designed to prepare individuals with the knowledge and skills necessary for a successful nursing career in the ever-changing healthcare landscape.

Tuition per session

$560

Learn More

School of Postgraduate Studies

Master of Information Technology

Build in-demand tech skills and advance your career with a Master of Information Technology, designed to help you understand, manage, and innovate with modern digital systems.

Tuition per session

$850

Learn More

School of Postgraduate Studies

Master of Supply Chain Management

This program equips graduates and professionals with skills in supply chain design, procurement, logistics, inventory, demand planning, analytics, and operations, preparing them to improve efficiency and business performance.

Tuition per session

$845

Learn More

School of Postgraduate Studies

Master of International and Sustainable Development

Designed for graduates and professionals seeking advanced skills in sustainable development and global policy, this program builds expertise in project design, policy analysis, environmental governance, and international development.

Tuition per session

$845

Learn More

School of Postgraduate Studies

Master of Criminology and Security Management

This programme is for professionals and graduates to develop expertise in criminal behaviour analysis, intelligence gathering, and security planning. You will also examine the legal and ethical frameworks shaping modern security systems.

Tuition per session

$845

Learn More

School of Postgraduate Studies

Master of Public Administration

This programme prepares you to lead in governance, equipping you to shape policy, improve systems, and drive meaningful change in the public and nonprofit space.

Tuition per session

$850

Learn More

School of Postgraduate Studies

Master of Public Health

This programme equips you with the skills to lead in public health, helping you prevent disease, promote wellness, and make a lasting impact in communities and health systems.

Tuition per session

$970

Learn More

School of Postgraduate Studies

Master of Information Technology

Build in-demand tech skills and advance your career with a Master of Information Technology, designed to help you understand, manage, and innovate with modern digital systems.

Our Programmes and Courses Are
Regularly Reviewed by Experts

Our programmes and courses undergo regular review by industry and academic experts to ensure they meet the highest standards of quality and relevance.

Ayooluwa Nihinlola

Harvard University

Aniekeme Umoh

Harvard University

How It Works

Your Journey to Becoming A Miva Student

Our ever-growing catalogue of courses have been chosen to provide students with skills relevant for the 21st century.

Step 1

Choose Your Programme

Explore our 21st century programmes and pick the one that fits your career goals.

Step 2

Apply Online

Complete your free online application — it only takes a few minutes.

Step 3

Get Your Admission Letter

Once approved, you'll receive your admission offer straight to your inbox.

Step 4

Start Learning Anywhere

Join your online classroom, meet your tutors, and begin your learning journey.

Our admission process is designed to help you begin your studies with ease – from choosing your programme to joining your first online class, everything happens in just a few easy steps.

Pre-recorded and Live Lessons

Get A Glimpse of Our Recorded Lessons and Interactive Virtual Live Classes

Experience the convenience of studying from anywhere, anytime with our recorded lessons. Join learners from around the world in our interactive virtual live classes when you enroll at Miva.

The Evolution of Research in Photojournalism

Fundamentals of Neural Networks and Deep Learning

The Community-as-Partner Model

Concept and Nature of Investigative Journalism

Health Needs Assessment in Emergency Settings

The Evolution of Research in Photojournalism

Fundamentals of Neural Networks and Deep Learning

Academic Experience

Miva Masterclasses

Our Masterclasses provide students with an exceptional opportunity to learn from and engage with industry experts and accomplished professionals bridging the gap between academic knowledge and real-life.

Miva E-Library

Welcome to Miva Open University’s E-library

Explore limitless knowledge in our e-Library, a virtual hub of books, journals, research papers, and multimedia resources to support every academic pursuit.

24/7 Accessibility
User-friendly Interface
Cutting-edge Research Papers
Vast Collection
Remote Learning Support
Seamless Citations

04

/04

Jos Study Centre

In Jos, our study centre gives you a comfortable place to learn, meet people, and stay focused on your goals. Visit us at No. 3, Beach Road, Jos, Plateau State.

Partnerships

Miva Study & Community Centres

Connecting digital learning with real-world support.

01

/04

Abuja Campus

Located in the heart of Nigeria’s capital, our Abuja campus offers a vibrant mix of modern learning, real-world exposure, and a welcoming student community. Address is 1059 O.P. Fingesi Road, Utako, Abuja

Our Locations

Miva Study & Community Centres

Connecting digital learning with real-world support.

02

/04

Lagos Study Centre

Located in the heart of Lagos, our study centre offers a modern space for learning, real connections, and a welcoming community of students. You’ll find us at 376 Herbert Macaulay Way, Yaba.

Partnerships

Miva Study & Community Centres

Connecting digital learning with real-world support.

03

/04

PH Study Centre

Right in the centre of Port Harcourt, our study centre offers a simple, comfortable space where you can study, connect, and feel supported. Visit us at Plot 340, Sani Abacha Road, GRA Phase 3, Port Harcourt.

FAQs

Common Inquiries Students
Have About Miva

Is Miva licensed/accredited by the NUC?
Miva Open University is a degree-awarding open university, recognised and licensed by the National Universities Commission. Rest assured, our programmes adhere to rigorous standards of academic excellence and quality.
Can you get a job with an online degree?
Our curriculum empowers you for real-world success, granting you a competitive advantage in today’s job market. With online education gaining recognition, employers value degrees from esteemed institutions like ours.
Am I required to take JAMB/UTME?
Please note that submission of Joint Admissions and Matriculation Board (JAMB) results is not mandatory at this stage. However, upon admission to the university, the WAEC, NECO, GCE, or NABTEB results you provided will be verified for authenticity, and JAMB Regularisation obtained.
Are Miva graduates eligible to participate in the NYSC Programme?
Miva University students are excluded from participating in the NYSC programme. Our graduates will receive a “Letter of exclusion from NYSC”, which grants them the same rights as an NYSC certificate.
What are the requirements to study at Miva Open University?
To apply, you need WAEC, NECO, GCE, or NABTEB. The result must include a minimum of five credits in the course-relevant subjects (including English and Mathematics) in not more than two sittings. Application is free!
What is the duration of a bachelor's degree programme at Miva Open University?
The standard duration to earn a degree at Miva Open University is four (4) years which is the same duration as earning a degree through traditional, in-person education..
Are open universities better than traditional universities?
Open universities offer several advantages such as flexibility, accessibility, and convenience, allowing students to balance their education with other personal commitments. You can study from anywhere in the world and pursue your dreams at the same time.
How much is the tuition fee?
Our tuition fees start at just ₦300,000$560 per year. We also provide flexible payment plans to ensure that financing your education is convenient and manageable.
How do online classes work?
You will learn in a virtual classroom using Miva Open University’s learning management system. You can access pre-recorded content at your convenience and engage in real-time activities with other learners. The learning management system enables interaction between you, other students and teachers, offering access to course materials, discussion forums, multimedia content, and assessments.
Will I need to physically attend lectures?
Miva Open University offers online lectures. Optional meets and greets and other engagement events may be organized for students to interact with faculty members and classmates. In-person attendance is not compulsory.
How long does it take to earn a degree at Miva?
The standard duration to earn a degree at Miva Open University is four (4) years which is the same duration as earning a degree through traditional, in-person education.
What countries are Miva University courses available for?
Students from all over the world are encouraged to apply to Miva Open University. The students need only verify that they have acquired O’ level qualifications.
Can I take study breaks?
Yes, you can take study breaks. You would, however, need to contact the academic support team to enable you to properly structure your breaks.
How will I take my exams?
At Miva Open University examinations are administered at our physical centers across various states in Nigeria. For students located outside Nigeria, examinations are facilitated through proctored arrangements.
